odoo.data:
<record id="module_category_" model="ir.module.category">
10
<record id="group__user" model="res.groups"> User <field name="category_id" ref="module_category_"/>
<record id="group__manager" model="res.groups"> Manager <field name="category_id" ref="module_category_"/> <field name="implied_ids" eval="[(4, ref('group__user'))]"/>
